name: Mexican Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry ingredients together.
2. Mix moist ingredients (water, applesauce, and vegetables) separately.
3. Combine the wet mixture with the dry mixture.
4. Pour batter into a lightly oiled or non-stick 8-inch square baking pan.
5. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
